message:
🧹 Replace style-prop magic numbers with named constants in llmd + GPU cards (#10117)

Extract minHeight/width inline style values into shared constants
(CHART_MIN_HEIGHT_PX, CHART_MIN_HEIGHT_TALL_PX) in lib/constants/ui.ts
and file-scoped constants (GPU_RING_SIZE_PX, LEGEND_PANEL_WIDTH_PX)
for component-specific dimensions. 8 replacements across 6 files.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
